series_metadata.series_description: Documentation to prepare the yearly IACP report which may include: planning documents; copies of narratives, flowcharts, and other systems documentation; vulnerability assessments; internal control checklists; test of controls; reports; inter/intra-agency communications; and agency review (ARES) information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 3 years then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 3 years then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
